title: NLP-028-propose-an-nlp-solution-for-fake-news-detection.
author: AI 面试题库
abstract:
NLP-028 Propose an NLP solution for fake news detection.

 28. Propose an NLP solution for fake news detection.
答案要点:
方法:
1. 特征工程:
   - 文本特征 (TF-IDF, BERT embeddings)
   - 风格特征 (情感、主观性)
   - 元数据 (来源、作者)
2. 模型:
   - BERT/RoBERTa  fine-tuning
   - Multi-modal (文本 + 图像)
3. 验证:
   - Fact-checking APIs
   - Cross-reference with trusted sources

质量评分: 94/100 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

---

---
